summary: Iteration 58 - All features verified for TRANSFORM app. Backend: 16/16 tests passed. Frontend: All KPI details, Payments sync, Attendance, Courses page features working correctly.

minor.issue: active_members returns 93 (slightly different from expected 91) - may be due to data changes during session

critical_code_review_comments: payments.py: Lines 61-137 - sync_payments_with_members correctly creates schedules for ALL billing members and payments only for amount>0
payments.py: Lines 238-292 - mark_payment_paid creates accounting_transaction with proper category and recalculates KPI
kpis.py: Lines 110-277 - get_monthly_kpi_details returns recurring_revenue from billing_enabled members excluding coaches
courses.py: Lines 25-43 - get_course_types and create_course_type endpoints for dropdown functionality
members.py: Lines 408-441 - dissociate_duo endpoint clears DUO flags from both members
AttendancePage.js: Line 79 - startWeek correctly set to 1 (S1)
CoursesPage.js: Lines 111-123 - course types fetched and used in dropdown with create option
KPIDetailedView.js: Lines 121-157 - CollapsibleRecurring component with toggle functionality
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_CourseType_* entries during testing (can be cleaned up)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 58 verified all 10 requested features: (1) GET /api/members/stats returns active_members=93, active_coaches=29; (2) POST /api/payments/sync-with-members creates 92 schedules and 85 payments for billing members; (3) POST /api/payments/{id}/mark-paid creates accounting_transaction with transaction_created=true; (4) GET /api/monthly-kpis/2026-03/details returns 60 recurring_revenue items totaling 8645 CHF; (5) GET /api/course-types returns 11 course types; (6) POST /api/course-types creates new course type; (7) POST /api/members/{id}/dissociate-duo works for DUO members; (8) Dashboard KPI Details shows collapsible recurring section with toggle; (9) Payments page shows 87 payments (45 late, 39 pending) with correct billing dates; (10) Attendance page starts at year 2026 and week S1

POST_payments_sync_with_members.evidence: Creates 92 schedules and 85 payments for March 2026

GET_monthly_kpis_details_recurring.evidence: 60 recurring_revenue items, 8645 CHF total, no coaches

GET_course_types.evidence: Returns 11 course types including Hyrox variations

POST_course_types.evidence: Creates new course type, rejects duplicates with 400

POST_dissociate_duo.evidence: Clears is_duo flags, returns success message

Dashboard_KPI_Details_Toggle.evidence: Collapsible toggle with data-testid=toggle-recurring-details found and working

Payments_Page_Sync.evidence: 87 payments shown with late(45)/pending(39) status, matching billing dates (28 mars 2026)
